result:
All 30 tests pass. The implementation added these v2 commands to the existing C# project:

- **`status`** — lists staged files or `(none)`
- **`diff <c1> <c2>`** — compares two commits, reporting Added/Removed/Modified files
- **`checkout <hash>`** — restores files from a commit, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset <hash>`** — moves HEAD without touching working directory
- **`rm <file>`** — removes a file from the staging index
- **`show <hash>`** — displays commit metadata and file list with two-space indent
